# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 29 — American Opportunity Credit (Refundable AOTC) from Form 8863 line 8

> Tax year 2025. Last re-authored 2026-06-15.

---

## 1. Outputs

| Output field | Java model | Form 1040 destination |
|---|---|---|
| `Payments.americanOpportunityCredit` | `Form8863.line8RefundableAotc` | **Line 29** (refundable AOTC) |
| `Schedule3NonrefundableCredits.educationCredits` | `Form8863.line19NonrefundableEducationCredits` | Schedule 3 line 3 → Form 1040 line 20 |

★ **INSEPARABLE from line 20** — both outputs are produced by a single `computeForm8863()` call. The refundable line 29 and the nonrefundable Schedule 3 line 3 cannot be separated.

### Full Form8863 output fields (Form8863.java)

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `header` | `Form8863Header` — taxpayer name + SSN for PDF Part I/II header |
| `students` | `List<Form8863Student>` — per-student static data + computed intermediates |
| `studentCount` | Total students (taxpayer + spouse merged on MFJ) |
| `magiForPhaseout` | MAGI used for phaseout (AGI + 4 add-backs) |
| `magiExceedsPhaseoutCeiling` | True when MAGI ≥ upper phaseout threshold |
| `phaseoutThresholdLine2` | Upper phaseout threshold by filing status (PDF line 2) |
| `phaseoutRangeLine5` | Phaseout range by filing status (PDF line 5) |
| `phaseoutFractionLine6` | Clamped phaseout fraction (HALF_UP to 3 dp) |
| `line1TotalAotcBeforePhaseout` | Sum of per-student line 30 (AOTC base) before phaseout |
| `line7AllowableAotc` | `line1 × phaseoutFraction` — rounded |
| `line8RefundableAotc` | **40% × line 7 → Form 1040 line 29** |
| `line19NonrefundableEducationCredits` | Nonrefundable ed credits after Part II Credit Limit Worksheet → Sched 3 line 3 |

### Form8863Student fields (Form8863Student.java)

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `studentName` | Student first + last name |
| `studentSsn` | Student TIN (PDF f2_6–f2_8) |
| `creditType` | `'aotc'` or `'llc'` |
| `adjustedQualifiedEducationExpenses` | Qualified expenses from intake |
| `institution1Name` / `institution1Address` | First institution (PDF f2_9 / f2_10) |
| `institution2Name` / `institution2Address` | Second institution (optional) |
| `perStudentLine30` | AOTC Part III line 30 — max $2,500; null for LLC |
| `perStudentLlcExpenses` | LLC expenses for Part III line 31; null for AOTC |

---

## 2. Computed inputs (must exist before `computeForm8863` runs)

| Field | Source | Used in |
|---|---|---|
| `form1040.adjustments.line11bAmountFromLine11aAdjustedGrossIncome` | `buildAdjustments()` | MAGI base |
| `form1040.taxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits` | `computeLine18()` | Part II Credit Limit Worksheet |
| `Schedule3NonrefundableCredits.foreignTaxCredit` | `applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()` | CLW prior-credit subtraction |
| `Schedule3NonrefundableCredits.childDependentCareCredit` | `finalizeForm2441PartII()` | CLW prior-credit subtraction |
| `Schedule3NonrefundableCredits.elderlyDisabledCredit` | `applyScheduleRToSchedule3()` | CLW prior-credit subtraction |
| Form 2555 computed output (taxpayer + spouse on MFJ) | `computeForeignEarnedIncome()` | MAGI add-back auto-fill (G-NEW-12) |

---

## 3. Input statement forms

| Form | Field | Used for |
|---|---|---|
| (none directly — Form 8863 is entirely personal-form-driven) | — | — |

Form 1098-T is **NOT** an input statement form in this codebase — it's a per-student boolean assertion on the personal form (`receivedAny1098TForClaimedStudents`). The form does not parse 1098-T statements.

---

## 4. Input personal forms

### 4a. `form-education-credits-taxpayer.xlsx`

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `claimsEducationCreditsOnReturn` | Entry gate — must be true for Form 8863 to be built |
| `claimedAsDependentOnAnotherReturn` | IRC §25A(g)(3) hard-disqualify (G-NEW-5) |
| `taxpayerOrSpouseDisqualifiedAsNonresidentAlien` | IRC §25A(g)(7) hard-disqualify (G-NEW-10) |
| `taxpayerTinIssuedByDueDate` | IRC §25A(g)(1) hard-disqualify (must be true) |
| `aotcPreviouslyDenied` | Triggers Form 8862 AOTC gate |
| `refundableAotcRestrictionApplies` | Under-24 rule (forces line 8 = 0; shifts line 7 to line 9) |
| `receivedAny1098TForClaimedStudents` | Drives 1098-T advisory |
| `usingAlternativeEnrollmentDocumentationForAnyStudent` | Suppresses 1098-T advisory when alternative docs claimed |
| `magiAddBackPuertoRicoExcludedIncome` | MAGI manual add-back |
| `magiAddBackForm2555ExcludedIncome` | MAGI manual add-back (auto-fill via G-NEW-12 when blank) |
| `magiAddBackForm2555HousingExclusion` | MAGI manual add-back |
| `magiAddBackForm4563ExcludedIncome` | MAGI manual add-back |
| `taxpayerEducationCreditStudents[]` | Per-student entries (Part III) |

### 4b. `form-education-credits-spouse.xlsx` (MFJ only)

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `spouseHasAdditionalEducationCreditStudents` | Gate — spouse-side students join the AOTC pool on MFJ only |
| `spouseEducationCreditStudents[]` | Per-student entries (spouse side) |

### 4c. Per-student fields (within `taxpayerEducationCreditStudents[]` / `spouseEducationCreditStudents[]`)

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `creditTypeRequested` | `'aotc'` or `'llc'` |
| `studentFirstName` / `studentLastName` / `studentTin` | Identification |
| `qualifiedEducationExpenses` | Drives line 30 (AOTC) or line 31 (LLC) |
| `institution1Name` / `institution1Address` / `institution1EIN` | Required |
| `institution2Name` / `institution2Address` / `institution2EIN` | Optional |
| AOTC-disqualifier flags (felony drug conviction; first 4 years already claimed; no degree program; less than half-time enrollment) | Force per-student LLC fallback or exclusion |

### 4d. `form-form8862.xlsx`

| Field | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `claimsAOTC` | Required when `aotcPreviouslyDenied=true` |
| `aotcStudentEligible[]` | Per-student eligibility after re-cert |

---

## 5. Validation flags

| Flag | Severity | Trigger |
|---|---|---|
| `EDUCATION_CREDITS_TAXPAYER_CLAIMED_AS_DEPENDENT` | BLOCKING | `claimedAsDependentOnAnotherReturn=true` |
| `EDUCATION_CREDITS_NONRESIDENT_ALIEN_INELIGIBLE` | BLOCKING | `taxpayerOrSpouseDisqualifiedAsNonresidentAlien=true` |
| `EDUCATION_CREDITS_TAXPAYER_TIN_NOT_BY_DUE_DATE` | BLOCKING | `taxpayerTinIssuedByDueDate=false` |
| `EDUCATION_CREDITS_MFS_INELIGIBLE` | BLOCKING (non-overrideable per rules.md §17) | Filing status = MFS |
| `FORM_8862_AOTC_REQUIRED` | NON-BLOCKING ADVISORY | `aotcPreviouslyDenied=true` AND (no Form 8862 OR `claimsAOTC=false`) — AOTC students blocked; LLC continues |
| `AOTC_1098T_NOT_RECEIVED_NO_ALTERNATIVE` | NON-BLOCKING ADVISORY | `receivedAny1098TForClaimedStudents=false` AND not using alternative docs |

---

## 6. Compute order

1. `applyOtherCreditsToSchedule3` (Foreign Tax Credit, Child & Dependent Care, Elderly/Disabled) — feeds CLW prior-credit subtraction
2. `applyForm8863ToSchedule3` calls `computeForm8863` — sets line 19 and line 29
3. Pre-set `earlyPayments.americanOpportunityCredit = form8863.line8RefundableAotc` BEFORE `computeSchedule8812` runs (Part II-B line 24 reads it)
4. `computeSchedule8812` — uses the pre-set value
5. `computeLine31ThroughLine38` — at lines 27231-27234, idempotently re-sets `payments.setAmericanOpportunityCredit(form8863.getLine8RefundableAotc())` only when value > 0

★ **Compute-order constraint**: Form 8863 must run BEFORE Schedule 8812 because the refundable AOTC is an input to Schedule 8812 Part II-B line 24.

---

## 7. 2025 constants

| Constant | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `AOTC_PHASEOUT_UPPER_MFJ` | $180,000 | ReferenceData |
| `AOTC_PHASEOUT_UPPER_OTHER` | $90,000 | ReferenceData (Single/HOH/QSS — G1 fix: QSS uses Single bucket, NOT MFJ) |
| `AOTC_PHASEOUT_RANGE_MFJ` | $20,000 (band $160k–$180k) | ReferenceData |
| `AOTC_PHASEOUT_RANGE_OTHER` | $10,000 (band $80k–$90k) | ReferenceData |
| AOTC per-student first-tier cap | $2,000 | IRC §25A(b)(1)(A) — 100% of first $2,000 |
| AOTC per-student second-tier cap | $2,000 | IRC §25A(b)(1)(B) — 25% of next $2,000 |
| AOTC max per-student | $2,500 | IRC §25A(b)(1) |
| Refundable portion factor | 40% | IRC §25A(i)(5) |
| Refundable max per student | $1,000 | $2,500 × 40% |
| Phaseout fraction rounding | HALF_UP to 3 dp | G-NEW-3 (was ROUND_DOWN; 2025 IRS instructions require HALF_UP) |

---

## 8. Key backend locations

| Item | Location |
|---|---|
| `computeForm8863` helper | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26295` |
| MAGI computation (4 add-backs) | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26385-26418` |
| Phaseout fraction (HALF_UP) | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26429-26439` |
| MFS hard-disqualify gate | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26374-26380` |
| `applyForm8863ToSchedule3` (call site) | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:1742-1749` |
| `earlyPayments` pre-set | Inside orchestrator, before `computeSchedule8812` call |
| Final wiring | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27231-27234` |

---

## 9. Key invariants

1. **Co-output rule**: `Form8863.line8RefundableAotc + Form8863.line19NonrefundableEducationCredits` ≤ tax-law allowable AOTC + LLC.
2. **MFS hard-disqualify is non-overrideable**: Education credits cannot be claimed MFS under IRC §25A(g)(6). Return null.
3. **QSS uses Single phaseout bucket**: $90k upper / $10k range — NOT MFJ. (G1 fix.)
4. **Form 8863 must run before Schedule 8812**: Schedule 8812 Part II-B line 24 reads the pre-set refundable AOTC.
5. **HALF_UP to 3 dp phaseout**: 2025 IRS instruction for line 6 and line 18.
6. **TIN by due date**: ITIN obtained later does not cure (IRC §25A(g)(1)).
7. **Idempotent re-wiring**: `computeLine31ThroughLine38` re-sets the field only when > 0 to avoid overwriting null with 0.
